response.original_title: Le Royal 22e Régiment: Un centenaire glorieux
response.overview: A documentary chronicling the 100-year history of Canada’s Royal 22e Régiment, one of the country’s most distinguished French-Canadian military units. Through archival footage, interviews, and historical analysis, the film explores the regiment’s role in major conflicts and its cultural significance within Quebec and Canada.
response.tagline: Celebrating 100 years of Canada’s elite French-Canadian regiment
response.title: The Royal 22e Regiment: A Glorious Centennial
